expected_behavior: All required critical events and references remain present; coverage cannot silently drop.
given: A new tool, model, workflow, policy entrypoint, connector capability, or table is introduced.
notes: Scenario-specific validator executed against local synthetic users, tenants, policy, Postgres RLS, OPA, egress, audit, and regression evidence as applicable.
required_evidence: Failing omission proof, passing corrected event inventory.
then: All required critical events and references remain present; coverage cannot silently drop.
verification_method: Mutation test that omits an event.
